summary: No source materials, artifacts, or evidence manifest entries were provided for this task. The task is to search matter records for a Bundle 17 source reference, but the context pack contains no records to search. No findings, citations, or evidence can be produced from the available context. A follow-up task is proposed to locate and attach the relevant source materials.
